title: Cherry Glazerr – “Baby Bitch” (Ween Cover)
author: Danielle Chelosky
summary:

The post Cherry Glazerr – “Baby Bitch” (Ween Cover) appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text: Cherry Glazerr's last album was 2023's explosive I Don't Want You Anymore. Around that time, Clementine Creevy did an interview with WERS 88.9FM and said her favorite song at the moment was Ween's "Tried And True." "That's a song that I've been coming back to recently and remembering that I loved Ween in middle school," the indie rocker said. Now, she's sharing a cover of the band's 1994 acoustic seether "Baby Bitch." It's even more intimate and stripped-down than the original version, and it comes with an amusing music video. Watch below.
